zh.of Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill於大約1123年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾時，他的父親Essulf Ulfsson25歲，母親Maud FitzUlf29歲。他於1148年與Etheridge FitzRoger在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年在英國越可爾恩爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.of Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾恩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill于大约1123年出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲Essulf Ulfsson25岁，母亲Maud FitzUlf29岁。他于1148年与Etheridge FitzRoger在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年在英国越可爾恩爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Jordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill was born about 1123, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Essulf Ulfsson, was 25 and his mother, Maud FitzUlf, was 29. He married Etheridge FitzRoger in 1148, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1169, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill est né environ 1123, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Essulf Ulfsson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maud FitzUlf, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Etheridge FitzRoger en 1148, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1169, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill um 1123 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Essulf Ulfsson 25 und seine Mutter Maud FitzUlf 29. Er hat 1148 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Etheridge FitzRoger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill è nato il circa 1123 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Essulf Ulfsson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maud FitzUlf, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Etheridge FitzRoger nel 1148, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1169, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.of Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒル
ja.Thornhill, York, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒル
ja.Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhillが約1123年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父Essulf Ulfssonは25歳，母Maud FitzUlfは29歳であった。1148年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでEtheridge FitzRogerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill(이)가 대략 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Essulf Ulfsson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud FitzUlf(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Etheridge FitzRoger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Thornhill, Yorkshire, England: Thornhill, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill nasceu aproximadamente 1123, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Essulf Ulfsson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maud FitzUlf, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Etheridge FitzRoger em 1148, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1169, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill родился около 1123 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Essulf Ulfsson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud FitzUlf, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Etheridge FitzRoger в 1148 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1169 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordon Fitzessulf de Thornhill nació aproximadamente 1123, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Essulf Ulfsson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maud FitzUlf, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Etheridge FitzRoger en 1148, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1169, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
